description_long: This house features a brick exterior with a combination of flat and gable roofs, and a prominent two-story bay window section at the front. The property is enclosed by a white perimeter wall and includes a driveway leading to a double garage with white doors. The backyard is landscaped with a tree, a paved patio area, and a covered gazebo structure with green roofing. Windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with multiple rectangular panes and a large bay window at the front. The main entryway is marked by double doors with glass inserts, flanked by windows and accessed via a small paved area. The overall design blends traditional and modern elements, with a focus on functional outdoor spaces and a clear separation between front and rear yards.
description: A two-story brick house with a bay window, double garage, and landscaped backyard featuring a gazebo and tree, all enclosed by a white wall. The design combines traditional and modern elements with functional outdoor areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the two-story bay window, double garage, main entryway with double doors, and part of the driveway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage roof, side wall, and a clear view of the backyard with the gazebo and tree.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard patio, gazebo with green roof, tree, and the back facade of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side wall, part of the backyard, and the gazebo structure.
attribute_architectural_style: Transitional (mix of traditional and modern elements)
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with bay windows and rectangular panes
attribute_entryway_design: Double doors with glass inserts, flanked by windows, accessed via a small paved area, no porch or columns
